payload.title: Local server proxies the collaboration endpoints to the bound remote
payload.description: When bound, the local server forwards the collab API to the remote hub with the stored API key (Authorization: Bearer), so the existing same-origin web UI just works and the key never reaches the browser. Proxy: GET/POST /api/projects, /api/projects/:id/members(+role/remove), /api/projects/:id/invites(+revoke), /api/invites/accept, /api/projects/:id/presence, /auth/keys(+revoke). Scope strictly to these collab paths (ticket data stays local-then-synced). Handle remote errors/offline gracefully.
